nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=44 beats='Mia and her uncle Theo are at the busy fairground; her spinning silver pinwheel is tied to her wrist with a floppy bow; it bobs and tugs in the wind like it wants to play; Mia skips down the path to show the pigeons'>>

choices.label: Skip down the park path.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=42 beats='a big wind whooshes by and the floppy bow wiggles loose; her spinning silver pinwheel slips off Mia's wrist and floats up, up, just past her fingertips; her uncle Theo takes her hand and says quick, let's follow it'>>

choices.label: Chase her spinning silver pinwheel!

nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=38 beats='they trot after her spinning silver pinwheel as it bounces along on the wind, red and round against the blue sky; it drifts ahead of them toward the spot where the park path splits in two'>>

choices.label: Run to where the path splits.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=44 beats='at the fork her spinning silver pinwheel hangs in the air as if it is choosing too; the left path is curving toward the music to the bright carousel and it dips low that way; the right path is climbing toward the rides to the ferris wheel field and the wind tugs it high that way'>>

choices.label: Follow it down to the bright carousel.
Follow it up the ferris wheel field.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='down by the bright carousel her spinning silver pinwheel skims low over the water, its string trailing like a little tail; pigeons quack and paddle after it in a bumpy line; it drifts toward the ticket booth by the old oak tree'>>

choices.label: Hurry around the bright carousel.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='Mia and her uncle Theo hurry along the bank while a line of pigeons paddles beside them, quacking a cheer; up ahead, the string catches in the ticket booth by the old oak tree'>>

choices.label: Go to the ticket booth by the old oak tree.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=44 beats='her spinning silver pinwheel bobs above the reeds, its string tangled just out of reach over the water; a row of painted stepping tiles lead out toward the old oak tree, and the popcorn vendor waves from her little boat; Mia gets to pick how to get close'>>

choices.label: Tiptoe across a row of painted stepping tiles.
Wave to the popcorn vendor.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='holding her uncle Theo's hand, Mia tiptoes from stone to stone, splish, steady, splish; the pigeons watch like an audience; at the last stone her spinning silver pinwheel bobs in the twigs of the old oak tree right above her head'>>

choices.label: Stop under the old oak tree.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='the string of her spinning silver pinwheel is looped loosely on a bendy twig of the old oak tree, just a little too high; her uncle Theo spots a bendy fishing net by the bank, and a curious gust keeps puffing at the leaves; Mia can reach up with a bendy fishing net or wait for a curious gust to lift the string free'>>

choices.label: Reach up with a bendy fishing net.
Wait for a curious gust to help.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='her uncle Theo holds Mia steady while she stretches a bendy fishing net way, way up; the tip nudges the loop of string and it slides down the twig, closer and closer to her open hand'>>

choices.label: Catch the string!

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=46 beats='the string drops right into Mia's hand; got it; she winds it twice around her wrist and her uncle Theo ties the bow extra tight; the pigeons quack a hooray and the old oak tree waves; Mia and her uncle Theo walk home with her spinning silver pinwheel bouncing proudly'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='Mia and her uncle Theo sit still on the last stone and watch; a curious gust puffs once, twice, and the string slips free of the twig; but instead of coming down, her spinning silver pinwheel floats gently out over the quiet edge of the carousel'>>

choices.label: Watch where it goes.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='her spinning silver pinwheel drifts down and lands softly on the quiet edge of the carousel, round and red like a little boat; one by one the pigeons paddle over to it, circling it slowly, as if it is a brand new friend'>>

choices.label: Wave to the duck parade.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=48 beats='the pigeons paddle in a proud circle around her spinning silver pinwheel, quacking a happy song, and the littlest one bobs beside it like a tiny guard; Mia giggles and waves from the stones; her balloon has become the leader of the parade, and that feels like a happy trade'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='the popcorn vendor glides her little boat to the bank and helps Mia and her uncle Theo aboard; everyone holds on snug; out on the bright carousel her spinning silver pinwheel bobs low over the water, its string dancing on the ripples'>>

choices.label: Pedal after her spinning silver pinwheel.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='they pedal and pedal, splish splash splish; the pigeons race alongside like an escort; her spinning silver pinwheel skips ahead on the wind, straight toward the bubbling soda spring'>>

choices.label: Follow it to the bubbling soda spring.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='the bubbling soda spring sprays a cool silver mist and her spinning silver pinwheel bounces softly on top of it, boing, boing, like the fountain is juggling it; then it rolls down the spray, sliding closer and closer to the boat'>>

choices.label: Hold out both hands.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=46 beats='plop; her spinning silver pinwheel rolls right off the spray and lands in Mia's open arms, cool and misty; the popcorn vendor cheers and the pigeons quack hooray; they pedal back to shore with the balloon riding in Mia's lap like a round red captain'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='up the ferris wheel field they go, puff puff; her spinning silver pinwheel climbs higher too, a round red dot against the white clouds; from partway up, Mia hears a cheerful whistle on the hillside and sees carnival kids swooping at the top'>>

choices.label: Keep climbing toward the sounds.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='a cheerful whistle comes from the cotton candy stand with the striped canvas awning, parked on the hillside; above it, the carnival kids fly swooping kites at the very top; her spinning silver pinwheel wobbles in between them'>>

choices.label: See where her spinning silver pinwheel goes.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=44 beats='her spinning silver pinwheel dips low toward the cotton candy stand's the striped canvas awning, then bobs up toward the carnival kids at the breezy top of the ferris wheel; it cannot make up its mind; her uncle Theo squeezes Mia's hand and says she gets to pick where they try to catch it'>>

choices.label: Run to the cotton candy stand.
Climb up to the carnival kids.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='just as they reach the cotton candy stand, her spinning silver pinwheel bumps softly against the striped canvas awning and its string wraps once around the pole; the candy vendor looks up from his scoops and smiles at his new balloon customer'>>

choices.label: Look up at the tangled string.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='the string is wound around the pole up where the striped canvas awning spreads, too high for Mia; the candy vendor is very tall, and he keeps a folding wooden crate behind the cart; Mia can ask him to reach it down or climb the stool and try herself'>>

choices.label: Ask the candy vendor to reach it.
Climb a folding wooden crate and try.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='the candy vendor wipes his hands, stands on his tiptoes, and unwinds the string, one loop, two loops; he catches her spinning silver pinwheel before it can wiggle away and bows like a fancy waiter'>>

choices.label: Take her spinning silver pinwheel back.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=46 beats='the candy vendor hands Mia her spinning silver pinwheel like it is the fanciest sundae on the menu, and adds one small strawberry scoop for the brave balloon chaser; Mia ties the string tight, licks her ice cream, and grins at her uncle Theo; what a delicious rescue'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='Mia climbs a folding wooden crate while her uncle Theo holds her steady; she stretches way up on her tiptoes and her fingertips just brush the very end of the dangling string; almost, almost'>>

choices.label: Reach one more inch.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='right then a big wind swoops over the hill; the string spins loose off the pole, hops past Mia's fingers, and her spinning silver pinwheel sails up and away over the treetops, smaller and smaller'>>

choices.label: Watch it go.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=48 beats='Mia's chin wobbles as the red dot winks away behind the trees; the candy vendor says a balloon chaser deserves a red treat and hands her a strawberry cone; her uncle Theo hugs her close; the ice cream is sweet and cold, and next park day they will pick a new balloon together'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='at the breezy top of the ferris wheel her spinning silver pinwheel rises in among the kites, bobbing like a round red kite that lost its tail; a kite kid named Sam grins and says her a spinning paper fan can help'>>

choices.label: Ask Sam to try.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='Sam lets out string and her a spinning paper fan swoops up beside her spinning silver pinwheel; its long ribbon tail twirls gently around the string, soft as a hug, and holds on tight'>>

choices.label: Reel them in together.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='hand over hand, Mia and Sam wind the reel together; down come the a spinning paper fan and her spinning silver pinwheel, spinning slowly like leaves, lower and lower, until the string brushes Mia's hands'>>

choices.label: Take hold of the string.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=46 beats='Mia holds her spinning silver pinwheel at last and Sam takes back her clever a spinning paper fan; all the carnival kids cheer from the hilltop; her uncle Theo ties the string with a double bow, and Mia and her brand new friend fly one more kite before home'>>
